ssmcontacts.contact.stage.CfnAbout: The `Stage` property type specifies a set amount of time that an escalation plan or engagement plan engages the specified contacts or contact methods.

ssmcontacts.contact.stage.DurationInMinu.Description: The time to wait until beginning the next stage. The duration can only be set to 0 if a target is specified.

ssmcontacts.contact.stage.RotationIds.Description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of the on-call rotations associated with the plan.

ssmcontacts.contact.stage.Targets.Description: The contacts or contact methods that the escalation plan or engagement plan is engaging.
